20.reason: Error: Loop condition should be i < n, not i <= n, because n is the last index (n-1) and the array has size n. Using i <= n causes out-of-bounds access.

28.reason: Error: Loop condition should be j < n, not j <= n, because n is the last index (n-1). Using j <= n causes out-of-bounds access in swap and recursion.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop condition should be j <= n only if n is the last index. But in main, perm is called with n-1 as 'n', so this loop should run j from begin to n (inclusive), which is correct given the call. However, combined with the previous error, this may cause confusion. The real issue is the print loop using <= n.]
